title: Electoral Bond Scheme Declared Unconstitutional
description: Supreme Court unanimously struck down Electoral Bonds as unconstitutional, violating right to information. SBI data revealed ₹8,000+ crore donated by companies facing government investigations — a clear quid pro quo.
impact: Democratic integrity, transparency in political funding

title: 2G Spectrum Scam — ₹1.76 Lakh Crore Loss
description: CAG report found spectrum given at 2001 prices causing ₹1.76 lakh crore loss. Telecom Minister A. Raja (DMK) jailed. SC cancelled 122 licences. Case ultimately ended in acquittal due to poor prosecution.

title: Pegasus Spyware — Government Surveillance of Journalists & Opposition
description: Investigation by international consortium revealed 300+ Indian mobile numbers — journalists, activists, opposition leaders — targeted with Israeli Pegasus spyware. Government refused SC-ordered inquiry access.

title: Manipur Ethnic Violence — 200+ Killed, 60,000+ Displaced
description: Ethnic violence between Meitei and Kuki communities. 200+ killed, 60,000+ displaced. CM N. Biren Singh (BJP) accused of siding with Meitei community. PM Modi silent for 77 days. Viral video of women paraded naked.

title: Sandeshkhali — TMC Leader's Sexual Violence & Land Grab
description: Women in Sandeshkhali (WB) alleged sexual assault and land grab by TMC leader Sheikh Shahjahan. Shahjahan fled for 55 days. CBI and ED raided after Calcutta HC intervention. Mass protests by women.

title: RG Kar Hospital Rape-Murder — Evidence Tampering Alleged
description: Junior doctor raped and murdered in RG Kar Medical College, Kolkata. Kolkata police accused of destroying evidence, cleaning crime scene. Ex-principal Sandip Ghosh arrested. CBI took over amid massive protests.

title: Demonetisation — Economic Shock, 100+ Deaths, RBI Says No Black Money Found
description: PM Modi announced demonetisation of ₹500 & ₹1000 notes. 99.3% notes returned to banks — negating the black money narrative. RBI annual report confirmed this. 100+ people died in queues. ₹1.5 lakh crore GDP loss estimated.
impact: GDP, informal economy, millions of livelihoods

title: Delhi Excise Policy Scam — Kejriwal Arrested
description: Kejriwal arrested by ED over Delhi Excise Policy 2021-22. ED alleges ₹100 crore kickback from liquor businessmen flowed to AAP election campaigns (Goa, Punjab). Manish Sisodia also arrested. SC granted bail to Kejriwal.
status: Trial ongoing, bail granted by SC

title: Coalgate Scam — ₹1.85 Lakh Crore CAG Loss Estimate
description: CAG report found coal blocks allotted without competitive bidding under PM Manmohan Singh's PMO causing ₹1.85 lakh crore loss. SC cancelled 214 coal block allocations.

title: Wynaad Forest Fire — Opposition MP's Constituency Delayed Relief
description: Massive landslide in Wayanad killed 400+. Opposition accused BJP central government of delaying NDRF and funds. Rahul Gandhi (local MP) flew in; central response criticized as delayed and insufficient.

title: Adani Group — Hindenburg Research Allegations & Parliamentary Row
description: Hindenburg Research accused Adani Group of stock manipulation and fraud. Adani's close ties to PM Modi questioned. SEBI probe ordered. Opposition demanded JPC; Congress alleged LIC and SBI public money put at risk.
impact: Public sector investments, crony capitalism concerns
status: SEBI probe, SC oversight, Adani denied all

title: Rape of Unnao — BJP MLA Convicted
description: BJP MLA Kuldeep Sengar convicted for raping minor. Father of victim died in police custody. Victim survived car accident after Allahabad HC hearing. Sengar expelled from BJP only after conviction by CBI court.
impact: Women's safety, political protection of criminals
